ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., point guard, power forward) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., NBA, NCAA) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's arena */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, finals) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_length" TEXT /* Length of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-game statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the player played */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points the player scored */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds the player grabbed */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists the player made */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals the player made */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks the player made */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers the player had */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls the player committed */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers the player made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-season statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the season */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the player played (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games the player played */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes the player played */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points the player scored */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds the player grabbed */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists the player made */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals the player made */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks the player made */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers the player had */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls the player committed */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers the player made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_career_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-career statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games the player has played */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes the player has played */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points the player has scored */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds the player has grabbed */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists the player has made */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals the player has made */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks the player has made */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers the player has had */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls the player has committed */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers the player has made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_career_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, All-Star) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., individual, team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_name" TEXT /* Name of the injury (e.g., knee sprain, broken ankle) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games the player missed due to the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who signed the contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the contract in dollars */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date the contract started */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date the contract ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-season statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the season */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the team played (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins the team had */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses the team had */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points per game scored by the team */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game grabbed by the team */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game made by the team */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game made by the team */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game made by the team */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Average turnovers per game had by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-game statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the team played */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points the team scored */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds the team grabbed */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists the team made */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals the team made */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks the team made */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers the team had */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls the team committed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coaching style (e.g., defensive-minded, fast-paced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_teams" (
  "coach_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach-team relationship */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coached by the coach */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the coach coached the team (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "record" TEXT /* Coach's record with the team (e.g., 50-32) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the draft took place */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted with */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was drafted */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team roster */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player on the roster */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the roster is for (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
